summary: Frontend-only testing of EventsTab (Rezervacije) news/event detail navigation. All 7 features tested and passing. News cards navigate to /news/[id], event cards navigate to /event/[id], both detail pages render correct content, back buttons return to EventsTab.
critical_code_review_comments: news/[id].tsx: Minor logic redundancy in ContentRenderer - when Platform.OS === 'web' OR !WebViewComponent, early return renders stripped text. But then code falls through to WebViewComponent usage (line 75-88). Since WebViewNative is null on web, the early return text is always rendered on web - this is actually correct but the code flow is slightly confusing. Not a bug, just code clarity.
event/[id].tsx: contentText is computed but only used as fallback when WebViewNative is null - correct on web. No issues.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seed data (5 news items, 2 events)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Navigation flows for news and events detail screens are working correctly. EventsTab correctly displays Gradske Vijesti and Nadolazeci Dogadjaji sections. Detail pages render all required elements. Back buttons work correctly returning to EventsTab.

feature_test_results.EventsTab_news_section: PASS - Gradske Vijesti shows news cards with category badge, date, title, preview, Procitaj vise link
feature_test_results.EventsTab_events_section: PASS - Nadolazeci Dogadjaji shows event cards with date box, title, location/time/price meta
feature_test_results.news_card_navigation: PASS - Clicking news card navigates to /news/[id]
feature_test_results.news_detail_elements: PASS - header with back button, Vijesti category badge, '23. aprila 2026.' date, title, short_description, HTML content as stripped text
feature_test_results.event_card_navigation: PASS - Clicking event card navigates to /event/[id]
feature_test_results.event_detail_elements: PASS - purple date banner (uto, 12. maj 2026. + 17:30), title, location/ticket/organizer info cards, content text
feature_test_results.back_button_news: PASS - router.back() from news detail returns to EventsTab
feature_test_results.back_button_event: PASS - router.back() from event detail returns to EventsTab
